question: What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer Eymyd-F (Ethyl Corp.) represented by SMILES [*]c1ccc(Oc2ccc(N3Cc4cc5c(cc4C3)CN(c3ccc(Oc4ccc(C([*])(C(F)(F)F)C(F)(F)F)cc4)cc3)C5)cc2)cc1, with no coating, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 0.0048231 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 8 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 2.410e+20 atom/cm^2?

What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer Perfluoroalkoxy copolymer resin [Teflon PFA 200 CLP] represented by SMILES [*]C(OC(F)(F)C(F)(F)C(F)(F)F)C(F)(F)C(F)(F)C([*])(F)F, with no coating, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 4.0 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 6300 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 8.430e+21 atom/cm^2?

What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer Polyacrylonitrile [Barex 210] represented by SMILES [*]CC([*])C#N, with no coating, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 4.0 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 6300 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 8.430e+21 atom/cm^2?

What is the base-10 logarithm of the atomic oxygen erosion yield of the polymer BTDA-mm'DDSO2 represented by SMILES [*]C(=O)c1ccc2c(c1)C(=O)N(c1cccc(S(=O)(=O)c3cccc(N4C(=O)c5ccc([*])cc5C4=O)c3)c1)C2=O, with no coating, oriented in the ram direction for a mission time of 0.00476598 years, subjected to a solar exposure of 20 equivalent sun hours and an atomic oxygen fluence of 3.500e+20 atom/cm^2?
